category_title: Students with behavioral difficulties and fragmented self-concept following personal trauma
scenario_title: Fragmented self-concept and emotional fluctuation during reflective tasks
minimal_context: Archie is completing a reflective journal entry about his personal history during a one-to-one session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your journal so we can complete your reflection on how things have been going recently and your personal history.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I've been feeling really really happy. My confidence has definitely gone up.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, write that down. What else comes to mind?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Well, before the accident I was doing my hobbies... but then it happened. I'm just slow now. I used to just feel awful.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It's a struggle. I don't know who I am anymore without my hobbies. It's just a weighty depression and I'm worried. I keep, falling into depression.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your journal so we can complete your reflection on how things have been going recently and your personal history.

STUDENT: I've been feeling really really happy. My confidence has definitely gone up.

TUTOR: Okay, write that down. What else comes to mind?

STUDENT: Well, before the accident I was doing my hobbies... but then it happened. I'm just slow now. I used to just feel awful.

TUTOR: Keep going with your reflection.

STUDENT: It's a struggle. I don't know who I am anymore without my hobbies. It's just a weighty depression and I'm worried. I keep, falling into depression.

task.content: Completing a narrative interview or journal reflecting on how things have been going recently and personal history

context.materials: Journal, poems aimed at promoting reflection
context.social_setting: One-to-one interview or independent homework setting

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When reflecting on an event in which he was involved in an accident that impacted his capacity to undertake hobbies which had defined his sense of self
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Presents disjointed narrative structures, uses language that implies dissatisfaction with himself (struggle, weighty depression worried, slow), and favours polarised descriptions of his feelings
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Disempowered position, unstable current sense of self, lack of sense of 'who he is'

behavior_patterns.condition: When describing his current emotional state
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Fluctuates in his descriptors of his current state (e.g., 'falling into depression' versus 'feeling really happy')
